title: Teatro Apolo
overview: In the late nineteenth century, Miguel Velasco, the son of a wealthy Spanish immigrant established in Mexico, comes to Madrid, where he falls in love with Celia, a chorus girl working at the Apollo theater.

trailers.title: Jorge Negrete - María de los Ángeles Morales  El puñao de Rosas (Teatro apolo) 1950.
